Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}...You heard all that, right? There've been rumors going around my class.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}The only time I feel safe now is when I'm with you, {f 4 1}-san.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}I don't really have anyone else I can count on...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}So you think I should just wait it out? I know you're probably right, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}When will the rumors stop? Will everyone just assume I'm a thief until then?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}You're the only one who's on my side, {f 4 1}-san...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}I don't know what I'd do on my own right now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 10 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I know you're right, but... how am I supposed to be strong in a situation like this?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I-I'm sure I sound like I'm helpless, but, um... I'm okay, just so you know.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 109 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I don't think it's right for me to always be counting on you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel like I understand[n]Chihiro a little better now...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I parted ways with Chihiro,[n]then went back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
